name: @borjie/learning-amplification
description: Continuous-learning amplification — Bayesian feedback loop ported from LitFin. Every observation (claim cited / confirmed / disputed / corrected, cron-verify / cron-change / source-dead) updates claim confidence so user 100 is measurably smarter than user 50. Nightly amplification job rolls up the observation window with exponential decay and adjusts truth_claims confidence + status.
